buckets.description: Treats a recommendation or warning as an already performed fact.
Extracts optimization targets but loses first-to-fifth priority order.
Merges distinct Polaris metrics such as Calculation Effort, Complexity, GB, Memory, Cell Count, and Populated Cell Count.
Drops conditions such as when performance degrades, when SUM is possible, or when cell counts are high.
Keeps only the positive recommendation and loses warnings or downsides.
Collapses a checklist or debugging sequence into one vague recommendation.
Turns prefer/avoid/consider language into absolute universal rules.
Uses broad summary predicates that cannot support the QA battery.
